summarization.a: The chart shows the drain current (I<sub>DSS</sub>) versus drain-source voltage (V<sub>DS</sub>) for Ni/Au-HEMT and Ga<sub>2</sub>O<sub>3</sub> MOS-HEMT devices.

a.question: What range of Vg was used for this measurement?
a.answer: The Vg varies from -6 V to +2 V in steps of 1 V.

a.question: How does the current change as the voltage changes?
a.answer: In both cases, the current increases to 5 V and then remains almost constant.

a.question: Which sample exhibit the highest current values?
a.answer: As can be seen in the figure, Ga2O3 MOS-HEMT sample reaches higher current values.

a.question: What is the I_DSS value for each ample?
a.answer: I_DSS of 608 mA/mm for Ni/Au-HEMT and I_DSS of 720 mA/mm for Ga2O3 MOS-HEMT.
